title: Old Endermen
description: Adds back the green enderman eyes from when endermen were first added in the Beta 1.8 pre-releases!
body:
Ever wanted endermen to have their old, green eyes in the latest verion? If so, then Old Endermen is the pack for you!

This pack brings back the green enderman eyes from the Beta 1.8 pre-releases!

NOTE: if you see an incompatible pack error, just ignore it. This pack is made for versions 1.21.8 and up.
